extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won from breakaway with bike throw over Schultz, while POGAČAR sprinted final 100m to retain yellow by 11 seconds over KÄMNA who nearly took it on time.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR actively defended yellow on MTF sprint despite pre-race speculation he'd surrender it before mountain stages.
KÄMNA came within 11 seconds of yellow by riding tempo in chase group, nearly taking jersey without attacking.
Breakaway struggled to establish on long downhill start, suggesting teams still protective before major mountain stages ahead.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: sprinted final 100m uphill to defend yellow when could have sat in, signals unwillingness to cede race lead
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: nearly took yellow by 11 seconds through tempo riding in chase group without attacking
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: gained time on POGAČAR in chase group but didn't attack, sitting 39 seconds back
rider_signals.SCHULTZ Nick: positive: nearly won from breakaway in debut Tour, lost by inches to CORT bike throw
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: won uphill sprint from breakaway with bike throw, first Tour stage since 2018
